element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns directional movement and stick-handling fundamentals
Player executes offensive plays without defensive pressure initially

element_introduction_order.element: Defensive mechanics (body check, poke check, blocking)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns reactive positioning and defensive timing
Player discovers evasion technique during offensive play
Player manages goalkeeper positioning and saves

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Exhibition/Regular Game mode - after rule violation
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns consequence system and penalty box mechanics
Player engages in high-risk confrontation with five-minute penalty consequence

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Exhibition/Regular Game mode - late game progression
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player manages line rotation and time-outs to refresh stamina
Player adapts strategy under reduced roster constraints
Player manages longitudinal performance across full season arc
Player competes in high-stakes elimination format
Player makes roster decisions (trading, signing, creation)
Player specializes in one-on-one goalie confrontation
Player calibrates opponent AI challenge level
Player analyzes completed actions for learning

typical_relief_triggers: Line rotation / stamina refresh during breaks
typical_tension_triggers: Defensive pressure and incoming shot attempts
Player fatigue accumulation during prolonged play
Penalty infractions and penalty box confinement
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical game-clock pacing with three-period structure; acute tension during active play punctuated by period breaks and scoreboard reviews; escalating difficulty in season/playoff modes drives longitudinal tension arc

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Difficulty settings (Rookie/Pro/All-Star) and toggleable features (fighting, penalties, fatigue, manual goalie control) allow players to customize engagement depth

difficulty_curve.early_game: Exhibition mode with Rookie difficulty; basic skating and offensive/defensive mechanics introduced without sustained penalty consequences
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Season mode progression with Pro difficulty; fatigue system, power plays, and penalty management accumulate; sustained 84-game arc requires tactical stamina management
difficulty_curve.late_game: Playoff modes (single-elimination or Best-of-7); All-Star difficulty; high-stakes elimination format and penalty shot pressure in Shootout mode; transactional roster management in Transactions mode
notable_spikes: Transition from Exhibition to Season mode (lengthened engagement and accumulated fatigue)
Best-of-7 playoff series vs. single-elimination format

notable_level_patterns.description: Single-game sandbox mode allowing free exploration of all mechanics (skating, shooting, checking, goalie control, fighting, penalties) without season consequences. Configurable opponent difficulty and toggleable systems enable graduated complexity.
84-game longitudinal progression with emergent fatigue management, line rotation strategy, and playoff qualification. Three-period match structure repeats with accumulating consequence.
Tournament brackets with escalating stakes: single-elimination (8 teams per conference) or Best-of-7 series. Each loss reduces roster availability and advances championship proximity.
Focused mini-game divorcing penalty shot execution from full-game context. Player practices single high-consequence action across five rounds.
Off-ice roster construction and trading system; player assumes GM role separate from on-ice performance. Enables hypothetical team building and free agent pool management.
